name: Linguistic Dynamics
description: Concepts governing how language evolves, drifts, and becomes codified through human-AI interaction. Focuses on linguistic change mechanisms and meta-linguistic awareness.

name: Meta-Cognitive Processes
description: Concepts addressing how participants maintain awareness of their own thinking, mutual understanding, and contextual alignment. Central to dialogue quality and misalignment detection.

name: Knowledge Synthesis
description: Concepts governing knowledge acquisition, retention, verification, and refinement through interaction. Emphasizes iterative deepening and artifact-based reasoning.

name: Interaction Dynamics
description: Concepts addressing dialogue structure, conversation quality, and moment-to-moment interaction patterns. Includes phenomenon and practices that occur at dialogue level.

name: Organizational Context
description: Concepts governing how AI systems operate within institutional constraints, hierarchies, and governance frameworks. Addresses institutional adoption and risk management.

name: Compound Meta-Cognitive Ecosystem
description: Integration of meta-cognitive awareness with knowledge synthesis processes. Represents how participants maintain mutual understanding while actively building new knowledge.

name: Prompt-Response Ontology
description: Concepts governing how meaning emerges through prompting patterns, linguistic evolution, and structured dialogue. Addresses both structure and content of interaction.

name: Collective Meaning-Making
description: How human-AI pairs collaboratively construct shared understanding, terminology, and conceptual frameworks. Represents the synergistic aspects of human-AI collaboration.
